itinerary.title: Ho Chi Minh City Arrival
itinerary.description: Our guide and driver will wait for you at the airport and transfer you by private car to the hotel in Ho Chi Minh Center. Complete the check-in procedure at 14:00 (there’s a surcharge fee if you want to check in early). The rest of the day is your free time to discover this lively metropolis at your own pace, and do not forget to sleep early for a new day's exploration.
itinerary.accommodation: Hotel in Ho Chi Minh City

itinerary.title: Ho Chi Minh city - Tan Phong Island - Mekong Eco-lodge
itinerary.description:
Morning

08:00: Our tour guide will meet you from your hotel lobby, then transfer you to the Cai Be tourist pier. Embark on the Mekong Ecolodge boat and start our exciting exploration of the Mekong Delta. Visit the Cai Be Floating Market, try fresh fruit on the boat, observe the vendors trading goods, and learn about the daily life of people on the river. Make our way to Com Candy Craft Village, where you can observe the process of making traditional candy from natural ingredients. Visit the nearby bee farm and enjoy a cup of warm honey tea

itinerary.title: Tan Phong Island - Ho Chi Minh City
itinerary.description:
Morning

Enjoy your breakfast in the fresh atmosphere of the countryside in the morning. 08:00: Meet our tour guide at the ecolodge, and receive your bicycle to start a cycling tour visiting locals’ houses to discover the life of people in Tan Phong Island up close. Start by visiting a local house and witness the fascinating process of making rice paper rolls. Then, head over to discover the ancient technique of knitting a hammock using banana rope. Moving on to explore the beautiful art of knitting water hyacinths into different products

itinerary.title: Ho Chi Minh City Tour on Motorbike - Fly to Nha Trang
itinerary.description:
Morning

Our friendly rider will pick you up from your hotel in Ho Chi Minh City to start a motorbike tour discovering the most famous places in Ho Chi Minh City. Again protesting the anti-Buddhist attitude of the South's government, a monk set himself on fire in 1963 at a historical crossroad. You get to know about the history of Vietnam through the stories and drive through backstreets and small valleys to reach local markets. Moving on to explore Thien Hau Pagoda. Chinese immigrants erected Thien Hau Pagoda in 1760, so it has the typical style of China architecture

itinerary.title: Full-day Rafting Tour in Nha Trang
itinerary.description:
Morning

09:00: Our friendly team will pick you up from your hotel and transport you to the starting point of our thrilling 40km rafting experience in Khanh Vinh District. Begin to raft downstream around 10:30. As you navigate the river, you'll be surrounded by breathtaking views of majestic mountains, lush greenery, and the melodious songs of birds. Along the way, we'll make a stop at a local orchard, where you can immerse yourself in the tranquil atmosphere and capture some truly peaceful moments. Afternoon

14:00: We'll continue our exhilarating rafting adventure, making our way toward the ...

itinerary.title: Full-day Biking To The Countryside in Nha Trang
itinerary.description:
Morning

08:30: After breakfast, you'll be picked up and taken to the Am Chua Temple. Wander around Am Chua, an old historical and cultural remnant of the homeland. This temple held many traditional rituals that represent and preserve many cultural and spiritual values. Cycle through the immense Dien Dien rice field, feel the gentle breeze of the countryside and keep biking along the picturesque Cai River. Have a break at Vinh Ngoc Ancient House for a BBQ lunch with fresh fruit and tea

itinerary.title: Free Day in Nha Trang
itinerary.description:
Today is your free day to discover Nha Trang. You can relax on the stunning beaches, explore the city center, try the local fresh seafood, or embark on our exciting tours below: 

Experience Royal Life on Emperor Cruise Full Day	FROM US $95 /pax
Fishing Tour at Hon Mun Island Full Day	FROM US $99 /pax

itinerary.title: Nha Trang - Flight to Da Nang - Hoi An
itinerary.description:
Morning

Enjoy breakfast at your hotel, then complete the check-out. Your tour guide will pick you up by private vehicle to Nha Trang for a train transfer to Da Nang. Upon your aerial, our friendly driver will wait for you at the Da Nang International Airport and drive you straight to the hotel in Hoi An. Afternoon 

We have some incredible tours in the charming town of Hoi An that we highly recommend. Let us know if you'd like to join any of them, and we'll make all the arrangements for you:

Hoi An Motorbike Street Food Tour Half Day	FROM US $49 /pax
Hoi An Memories Show Ticket	FROM US $24 /...

itinerary.title: Half-day My Son Tour - Join Group
itinerary.description:
Morning 

07:00 - 08:30: We can arrange a pick-up for you at your hotel (on request), then gather at the meeting point and start our adventure today to explore the ancient My Son Sanctuary. Start your journey by crossing the Cua Dai Bridge, where you can take in the spectacular views of Hoi An's nature and the Cham Islands. You will have a chance to visit a local fishing village and get a glimpse into the local way of life, as well as learn about their traditional methods of raising fish. Arrive at My Son Sanctuary, a UNESCO World Heritage Site and the former capital of the Cham Pa Kingdom fro...

itinerary.title: Free Day in Hoi An
itinerary.description:
Enjoy a free day in the world heritage-listed Hoi An Town. You may like to wander the Central Market and the street stalls selling paintings, woodwork, ceramics, lanterns, and more

To make the most of your time in Hoi An, we also offer a range of optional activities for you to choose from:

Hoi An: Half-Day Walking City Tour‎	FROM US $34 /pax
Tra Que Village by Bike & Cooking Class Half Day	FROM US $42 /pax
Cam Thanh Coconut Village & Lantern Making Half Day	FROM US $35 /pax
Authentic Hoi An - Cooking Class & Biking Full Day	FROM US $67 /pax
Cu Lao Cham Full Day Join Tour from Hoi An	FROM US ...

itinerary.title: Hoi An - Hue Adventure by Motorbike
itinerary.description:
Morning

After breakfast, get ready to embark on an exhilarating motorbike adventure starting at 08:00, as you travel from Hoi An to Hue. Brace yourself for an amazing ride along winding country lanes, and immerse in the picturesque landscapes of Vietnam. Conquer the legendary Hai Van Pass, renowned as one of the world's most breathtaking coastal routes. Marvel at the awe-inspiring scenery of majestic mountains, with clouds gently hovering around the peaks. Take a trip to Lang Co and take in the breathtaking scenery on the way there

itinerary.title: Discover Hue by Electric Motorbike Full Day
itinerary.description:
Morning

Your day begins at 08:00, as our friendly tour guide picks you up at the designated meeting point in the Hue city center. You’ll hop on an eco-friendly electric motorbike, ready to explore the rich cultural heritage and hidden gems of Vietnam’s ancient capital. The first stop is the majestic Hue Imperial City, the former seat of the Nguyen Dynasty (1802 - 1945) - Vietnam’s last feudal dynasty. You’ll wander through historical landmarks such as Ngo Mon Gate, Thai Hoa Palace, The Mieu Temple, Hien Lam Cac, and Cuu Dinh. These architectural marvels are surrounded by lush gardens, reflect...

itinerary.title: Hue to Hanoi - Hanoi City Tour by Scooter
itinerary.description:
Morning

After breakfast at the hotel, our driver will drive you to the airport for the flight to Hanoi. Upon your arrival, you will be taken directly to your hotel in Hanoi. Spend your time relaxing and preparing for the exciting city tour in the afternoon. Afternoon

13:00: Our tour guide will pick you up from your hotel, and let’s explore the charming city of Hanoi on the back of our scooter. During the tour, our guide will drive you to the most famous places in Hanoi and tell you fascinating stories and interesting information about these areas

itinerary.title: Halong Bay - Overnight on Cruise
itinerary.description:
Morning

08:00 - 08:30: After breakfast, our guide will transfer you to Halong Bay - a World Heritage with breathtaking islands and islets. This is a short transfer, which only takes about 2.5 hours on the road. Upon arrival, the boat crew welcomes you and assists you with the check-in process. The cruise starts boarding at around 12:00. You will enjoy the cruise with a tasty local lunch with fresh seafood served on board

itinerary.title: Halong Bay Discovery - Hanoi Transfer
itinerary.description:
Morning

Start your morning with a relaxing Tai Chi lesson and enjoy the spectacular sunrise over the bay. Have a light breakfast at 07:00, then spend the day exploring Halong's unique caves or kayaking. Return to the boat at 10:00 for check-out. Enjoy an early lunch while cruising back to the main dock for the transfer to Hanoi. 11:30 - 11:45: Arrive at the port and the boat crew will bid you farewell

itinerary.title: Hanoi Departure
itinerary.description:
Morning

Enjoy your last morning in Hanoi at your own pace. Our driver will take you to the airport by private car to take your departure flight. BestPrice Travel hopes to see you on your next trip!

NOTE: Your room is available until 12:00. Please contact your travel consultant if you need a late checkout.

highlights: Pedal through lush landscapes and picturesque villages of Tan Phong Island
Immerse yourself in the well-preserved ancient town of Hoi An, a UNESCO World Heritage Site
Embark on a memorable cruise through the limestone karsts and emerald waters of Halong Bay
Relax on the pristine beaches of Nha Trang
included: Overnight in shared Twin/ Double  room with Air-condition (AC) at hotel.
Overnight at local home-stay in a shared room, private blanket and mosquito net (if any)
All transport during tour on air - conditioned vehicle as per itinerary (including airport pick up & see off)
All in-tour stationed local English speaking guide.
Meals as indicated in the program
3 domestic flights Ho Chi Minh - Nha Trang, Nha Trang - Da Nang and Hue - Ha Noi
importantNotes: PROGRAMS & SCHEDULES SUBJECT TO CHANGE WITHOUT PRIOR NOTICE
